body:
Title: CRA Form T1A 2025 Request for Loss Carryback.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/t1a/t1a-25e.pdf

CRA T1A 2025 requests a carryback of a loss from 2025 to any of the three previous tax years. Part 2 calculates non-capital loss for carryback. Amount C is total loss. Amount D is total income. Amount E is the total of listed deduction lines 20800, 20805, 21000, 21300, 21400, 21500, 21900, 22000, 22200, 22215, 22300, 23200, and 23500 except specified note 2 amounts. Amount F is amount D minus amount E, floored at zero. Amount G is amount C minus amount F, floored at zero. Amount H is loss from farming and fishing. Amount I is income from farming and fishing. Amount J is amount H minus amount I, floored at zero. Amount K is the lesser of amount G or amount J. Amount L is amount G minus amount K, floored at zero. Lines 66250, 66260, and 66270 are non-capital loss applied to 2022, 2023, and 2024. Amount M adds lines 66250, 66260, and 66270 and cannot be more than amount L. The balance of non-capital loss available for carryforward is amount L minus amount M.

Part 3 calculates farming or fishing loss for carryback. Amount N is farming or fishing loss available for carryback from amount K. Lines 66300, 66310, and 66320 are farming or fishing loss applied to 2022, 2023, and 2024. Amount O adds lines 66300, 66310, and 66320 and cannot be more than amount N. The balance of farming or fishing loss available for carryforward is amount N minus amount O. Part 4 calculates restricted farm loss for carryback. Amount P is restricted farm loss for the year available for carryback. Lines 66480, 66490, and 66500 are restricted farm loss applied to 2022, 2023, and 2024. Amount Q adds lines 66480, 66490, and 66500 and cannot be more than amount P. The balance of restricted farm loss available for carryforward is amount P minus amount Q.

Part 5 calculates net capital loss for carryback. Amount R is the 2025 net capital loss from line 19900 of Schedule 3 available for carryback; if there is a net capital gain on line 19900, amount R is zero. Lines 66360, 66370, and 66380 are net capital loss applied to 2022, 2023, and 2024. Amount S adds lines 66360, 66370, and 66380 and cannot be more than amount R. The balance of net capital loss available for carryforward is amount R minus amount S. Part 6 calculates listed personal property loss for carryback. Amount T is listed personal property losses that exceed listed personal property gains for the year available for carryback. Lines 66420, 66430, and 66440 are LPP net loss applied to 2022, 2023, and 2024. Amount U adds lines 66420, 66430, and 66440 and cannot be more than amount T. The balance of LPP loss available for carryforward is amount T minus amount U.
